property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Python313\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Users\Testing\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk	ools in;C:\Users\Testing\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk	ools;C:\Program Files
odejs
ode_modules
pm in;C:\Users\Testing\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;.

testcase.name: runScenario["TC-03 - Complete end-to-end checkout with a single product", "Checkout Process"](1)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for url to contain "/cart.html". Current url: "https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html" (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Testing\scoped_dir...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:50930}, goog:processID: 8384, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:50930/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 0a3382ec6042e4b9a2ebccbbb4e1b5f0

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for url to contain "/cart.html". Current url: "https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html" (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Testing\scoped_dir...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:50930}, goog:processID: 8384, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:50930/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 0a3382ec6042e4b9a2ebccbbb4e1b5f0 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at com.saucedemo.utils.WaitUtils.waitForUrlContains(WaitUtils.java:43) at com.saucedemo.pages.BasePage.assertUrlContains(BasePage.java:88) at com.saucedemo.pages.CartPage.assertOnCartPage(CartPage.java:50) at com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.iClickCheckoutButton(CheckoutSteps.java:29) at ✽.I click the Checkout button(file:///C:/Users/Testing/Documents/selenium-bdd-framework/Sparkrock_test/src/test/resources/features/checkout.feature:14)
testcase.system-out:
@checkout @smoke @e2e @TC-03 Scenario: TC-03 - Complete end-to-end checkout with a single product # src/test/resources/features/checkout.feature:11 ▶ Starting: TC-03 - Complete end-to-end checkout with a single product Given I am logged in with username "standard_user" and password "secret_sauce" # com.saucedemo.steps.CartSteps.iAmLoggedIn(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [Screenshot] Saved to: reports/screenshots/step_TC-03_-_Complete_end-to-end_checkout_with_a_single_product_20260312_133632.png
Embedding Step Screenshot [image/png 311564 bytes]
Given I have added "Sauce Labs Backpack" to the cart # com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.iHaveAddedProductToCart(java.lang.String) [Screenshot] Saved to: reports/screenshots/step_TC-03_-_Complete_end-to-end_checkout_with_a_single_product_20260312_133632.png
Embedding Step Screenshot [image/png 328052 bytes]
When I navigate to the cart # com.saucedemo.steps.CartSteps.iNavigateToCart() [Screenshot] Saved to: reports/screenshots/step_TC-03_-_Complete_end-to-end_checkout_with_a_single_product_20260312_133633.png
Embedding Step Screenshot [image/png 321757 bytes]
And I click the Checkout button # com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.iClickCheckoutButton() org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for url to contain "/cart.html". Current url: "https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html" (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Testing\scoped_dir...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:50930}, goog:processID: 8384, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:50930/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 0a3382ec6042e4b9a2ebccbbb4e1b5f0 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at com.saucedemo.utils.WaitUtils.waitForUrlContains(WaitUtils.java:43) at com.saucedemo.pages.BasePage.assertUrlContains(BasePage.java:88) at com.saucedemo.pages.CartPage.assertOnCartPage(CartPage.java:50) at com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.iClickCheckoutButton(CheckoutSteps.java:29) at ✽.I click the Checkout button(file:///C:/Users/Testing/Documents/selenium-bdd-framework/Sparkrock_test/src/test/resources/features/checkout.feature:14)
And I enter first name "John", last name "Doe", postal code "10001" # com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.iEnterCheckoutInfo(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And I click Continue # com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.iClickContinue() Then the overview page should show "Sauce Labs Backpack" # com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.theOverviewPageShouldShow(java.lang.String) And the order summary totals should be visible # com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.theOrderSummaryTotalsShouldBeVisible() When I click Finish # com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.iClickFinish() Then the order confirmation page should be displayed # com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.theOrderConfirmationPageShouldBeDisplayed() And the confirmation message should be "Thank you for your order!" # com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.theConfirmationMessageShouldBe(java.lang.String) ✖ FAILED: TC-03 - Complete end-to-end checkout with a single product [Screenshot] Saved to: reports/screenshots/TC-03_-_Complete_end-to-end_checkout_with_a_single_product_20260312_133643.png
Embedding Failure Screenshot [image/png 321757 bytes]
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO org.testng.internal.Utils - [XmlSuite] [WARN] 'parallel' value 'false' is no longer valid, defaulting to 'none'. [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 145.0.7632.117 (resolved driver for Chrome 145) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as C:\Users\Testing\.cache\selenium\chromedriver\win64\145.0.7632.117\chromedriver.exe Mar 12, 2026 1:36:31 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 145 Mar 12, 2026 1:36:31 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 145.0.7632.160. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

@checkout @TC-03b Scenario Outline: TC-03b - Checkout with various products # src/test/resources/features/checkout.feature:36 ▶ Starting: TC-03b - Checkout with various products Given I am logged in with username "standard_user" and password "secret_sauce" # com.saucedemo.steps.CartSteps.iAmLoggedIn(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [Screenshot] Saved to: reports/screenshots/step_TC-03b_-_Checkout_with_various_products_20260312_133646.png

When I navigate to the cart # com.saucedemo.steps.CartSteps.iNavigateToCart() [Screenshot] Saved to: reports/screenshots/step_TC-03b_-_Checkout_with_various_products_20260312_133647.png

Embedding Step Screenshot [image/png 27024 bytes]
And I enter first name "Jane", last name "Smith", postal code "90210" # com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.iEnterCheckoutInfo(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [Screenshot] Saved to: reports/screenshots/step_TC-03b_-_Checkout_with_various_products_20260312_133647.png

And I click Finish # com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.iClickFinish() org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for url to contain "/checkout-step-two.html". Current url: "https://www.saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html" (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Testing\scoped_dir...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:50962}, goog:processID: 21832, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:50962/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 3416e1a09bdb9ebc6e1085d33ac355d6 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at com.saucedemo.utils.WaitUtils.waitForUrlContains(WaitUtils.java:43) at com.saucedemo.pages.BasePage.assertUrlContains(BasePage.java:88) at com.saucedemo.pages.CheckoutPage.assertOnOverview(CheckoutPage.java:116) at com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.iClickFinish(CheckoutSteps.java:45) at ✽.I click Finish(file:///C:/Users/Testing/Documents/selenium-bdd-framework/Sparkrock_test/src/test/resources/features/checkout.feature:30)
Then the order confirmation page should be displayed # com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.theOrderConfirmationPageShouldBeDisplayed() And the confirmation message should be "Thank you for your order!" # com.saucedemo.steps.CheckoutSteps.theConfirmationMessageShouldBe(java.lang.String) ✖ FAILED: TC-03b - Checkout with various products [Screenshot] Saved to: reports/screenshots/TC-03b_-_Checkout_with_various_products_20260312_133658.png
Embedding Failure Screenshot [image/png 24387 bytes]
